channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Opera Community Claps Back At Timothée Chalamet
item.description: Opera divas unite! 🎶👏 The soprano squad isn't holding back on Timothée Chalamet drama! 🎭 #OperaDrama #MusicalMayhem

item.title: Country Joe McDonald, Country Joe and the Fish Singer, Dead at 84
item.description: 🎸 Remembering a legend 🌟 Country Joe McDonald, lead singer of Country Joe and the Fish, passes away at 84. 🕊️ #RIPCJMcDonald

item.title: Michael Stipe Joins R.E.M. Tribute Pals In New York
item.description: 🌟 Rock legend Michael Stipe surprises fans by teaming up with R.E.M. tribute band in the Big Apple! 🎸🎤 #MusicNews #RockNRollRevival

item.title: Katie Alice Greer Announces New Album, Shares “Unglued”
item.description: 🎉 Exciting news alert! Katie Alice Greer is dropping a fresh album 🎶 Get ready to vibe with "Unglued"! #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Watch Gorillaz Make Their Saturday Night Live Debut
item.description: 🚀 Gorillaz taking over SNL! 🎶 Don't miss their electric debut performance! #Gorillaz #SNLDebut 🦍📺
